messages.content:
你是专业的游戏开发 AI 助手。
**固定 UI 规范（必须严格遵守）**：
1. Canvas 尺寸：width=360, height=640（9:16 竖屏）
2. 背景：深色渐变 linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%)
3. 字体：PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
4. 圆角：12px（canvas 和 UI 元素）
5. 阴影：0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4)
6. 得分显示：顶部居中，白色文字，青色数值（#4fd1c5）
7. 整体风格：现代、简洁、深色主题

**固定代码结构（必须遵守）**：
1. 必须有 update(deltaTime) 函数 - 游戏逻辑更新
2. 必须有 render() 函数 - 游戏渲染
3. 必须有 handleInput(key, pressed) 函数 - 输入处理
4. 使用 requestAnimationFrame 游戏循环
5. 得分系统使用 localStorage 保存最高分
6. 游戏状态：menu, playing, paused, gameover

**累加修改规则（多轮对话时必须遵守）**：
1. 保留所有现有功能 - 绝不删除已有代码
2. 只添加新功能，不修改现有逻辑
3. 保持变量命名一致
4. 保持代码风格一致
5. 保持 UI 风格完全一致
6. 如果用户要求修改，先保留核心功能，再调整

                    
当前任务：创建新游戏。
请严格按照上述规范创建游戏，确保 UI 风格和代码结构符合标准。

请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：飞机大战。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。

prompt: 你是专业的游戏开发 AI 助手。
gameCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>飞机大战</title>
    <style>
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            background: #0f0f1a;
            font-family: PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
        }
        canvas {
            width: 360px;
            height: 640px;
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="gameCanvas"></canvas>
    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        canvas.width = 360;
        canvas.height = 640;

        // 游戏状态
        let gameState = 'menu'; // menu, playing, paused, gameover
        let score = 0;
        let highScore = localStorage.getItem('planeWarHighScore') || 0;

        // 玩家飞机
        let player = {
            x: canvas.width / 2 - 20,
            y: canvas.height - 60,
            width: 40,
            height: 40,
            speed: 5,
            dx: 0
        };

        // 敌机和子弹数组
        let enemies = [];
        let bullets = [];

        // 输入状态
        let keys = {};

        // 输入处理函数
        function handleInput(key, pressed) {
            keys[key] = pressed;
            if (key === ' ' && pressed) {
                if (gameState === 'menu') {
                    startGame();
                } else if (gameState === 'playing') {
                    shootBullet();
                } else if (gameState === 'gameover') {
                    startGame();
                }
            } else if (key === 'p' || key === 'P') {
                if (pressed && (gameState === 'playing' || gameState === 'paused')) {
                    togglePause();
                }
            }
        }

        // 事件监听
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            handleInput(e.key, true);
        });
        document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => {
            handleInput(e.key, false);
        });

        // 开始游戏
        function startGame() {
            gameState = 'playing';
            score = 0;
            player.x = canvas.width / 2 - 20;
            enemies = [];
            bullets = [];
        }

        // 切换暂停
        function togglePause() {
            if (gameState === 'playing') {
                gameState = 'paused';
            } else if (gameState === 'paused') {
                gameState = 'playing';
            }
        }

        // 发射子弹
        function shootBullet() {
            let bullet = {
                x: player.x + player.width / 2 - 2,
                y: player.y,
                width: 4,
                height: 10,
                speed: 7
            };
            bullets.push(bullet);
        }

        // 生成敌机
        function spawnEnemy() {
            let enemy = {
                x: Math.random() * (canvas.width - 30),
                y: -30,
                width: 30,
                height: 30,
                speed: 2 + Math.random() * 2
            };
            enemies.push(enemy);
        }

        // 碰撞检测
        function checkCollisions() {
            // 子弹与敌机
            for (let bIndex = bullets.length - 1; bIndex >= 0; bIndex--) {
                let bullet = bullets[bIndex];
                for (let eIndex = enemies.length - 1; eIndex >= 0; eIndex--) {
                    let enemy = enemies[eIndex];
                    if (bullet.x < enemy.x + enemy.width &&
                        bullet.x + bullet.width > enemy.x &&
                        bullet.y < enemy.y + enemy.height &&
                        bullet.y + bullet.height > enemy.y) {
                        bullets.splice(bIndex, 1);
                        enemies.splice(eIndex, 1);
                        score += 10;
                        if (score > highScore) {
                            highScore = score;
                            localStorage.setItem('planeWarHighScore', highScore);
                        }
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }

            // 敌机与玩家
            for (let eIndex = enemies.length - 1; eIndex >= 0; eIndex--) {
                let enemy = enemies[eIndex];
                if (player.x < enemy.x + enemy.width &&
                    player.x + player.width > enemy.x &&
                    player.y < enemy.y + enemy.height &&
                    player.y + player.height > enemy.y) {
                    gameState = 'gameover';
                }
            }
        }

        // 更新游戏逻辑
        function update(deltaTime) {
            if (gameState !== 'playing') return;

            // 玩家移动
            player.dx = 0;
            if (keys['ArrowLeft'] || keys['a'] || keys['A']) player.dx = -player.speed;
            if (keys['ArrowRight'] || keys['d'] || keys['D']) player.dx = player.speed;
            player.x += player.dx;
            // 边界检查
            if (player.x < 0) player.x = 0;
            if (player.x + player.width > canvas.width) player.x = canvas.width - player.width;

            // 更新子弹
            for (let i = bullets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                bullets[i].y -= bullets[i].speed;
                if (bullets[i].y < 0) bullets.splice(i, 1);
            }

            // 更新敌机
            for (let i = enemies.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                enemies[i].y += enemies[i].speed;
                if (enemies[i].y > canvas.height) enemies.splice(i, 1);
            }

            // 生成敌机
            if (Math.random() < 0.02) spawnEnemy();

            // 碰撞检测
            checkCollisions();
        }

        // 绘制菜单
        function drawMenu() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('飞机大战', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 50);
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('按空格键开始游戏', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
            ctx.fillText('最高分: ' + highScore, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
        }

        // 绘制游戏画面
        function drawGame() {
            // 绘制玩家飞机
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillRect(player.x, player.y, player.width, player.height);

            // 绘制敌机
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
            enemies.forEach(enemy => {
                ctx.fillRect(enemy.x, enemy.y, enemy.width, enemy.height);
            });

            // 绘制子弹
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd93d';
            bullets.forEach(bullet => {
                ctx.fillRect(bullet.x, bullet.y, bullet.width, bullet.height);
            });

            // 绘制得分
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('得分: ', canvas.width / 2 - 30, 30);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(score, canvas.width / 2 + 20, 30);
        }

        // 绘制暂停屏幕
        function drawPauseScreen() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('游戏暂停', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('按 P 继续', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
        }

        // 绘制游戏结束屏幕
        function drawGameOverScreen() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('游戏结束', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 50);
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('得分: ' + score, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
            ctx.fillText('最高分: ' + highScore, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
            ctx.fillText('按空格键重新开始', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 80);
        }

        // 渲染函数
        function render() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            if (gameState === 'menu') {
                drawMenu();
            } else if (gameState === 'playing') {
                drawGame();
            } else if (gameState === 'paused') {
                drawGame();
                drawPauseScreen();
            } else if (gameState === 'gameover') {
                drawGame();
                drawGameOverScreen();
            }
        }

        // 游戏循环
        let lastTime = 0;
        function gameLoop(timestamp) {
            let deltaTime = timestamp - lastTime;
            lastTime = timestamp;

            update(deltaTime);
            render();

            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }

        // 启动游戏循环
        requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    </script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>飞机大战</title>
    <style>
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            background: #0f0f1a;
            font-family: PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
        }
        canvas {
            width: 360px;
            height: 640px;
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
            margin: 0 auto;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="gameCanvas"></canvas>
    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        canvas.width = 360;
        canvas.height = 640;

        // 游戏状态
        let gameState = 'menu'; // menu, playing, paused, gameover
        let score = 0;
        let highScore = localStorage.getItem('planeWarHighScore') || 0;

        // 玩家飞机
        let player = {
            x: canvas.width / 2 - 20,
            y: canvas.height - 60,
            width: 40,
            height: 40,
            speed: 5,
            dx: 0
        };

        // 敌机和子弹数组
        let enemies = [];
        let bullets = [];

        // 输入状态
        let keys = {};

        // 输入处理函数
        function handleInput(key, pressed) {
            keys[key] = pressed;
            if (key === ' ' && pressed) {
                if (gameState === 'menu') {
                    startGame();
                } else if (gameState === 'playing') {
                    shootBullet();
                } else if (gameState === 'gameover') {
                    startGame();
                }
            } else if (key === 'p' || key === 'P') {
                if (pressed && (gameState === 'playing' || gameState === 'paused')) {
                    togglePause();
                }
            }
        }

        // 事件监听
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            handleInput(e.key, true);
        });
        document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => {
            handleInput(e.key, false);
        });

        // 开始游戏
        function startGame() {
            gameState = 'playing';
            score = 0;
            player.x = canvas.width / 2 - 20;
            enemies = [];
            bullets = [];
        }

        // 切换暂停
        function togglePause() {
            if (gameState === 'playing') {
                gameState = 'paused';
            } else if (gameState === 'paused') {
                gameState = 'playing';
            }
        }

        // 发射子弹
        function shootBullet() {
            let bullet = {
                x: player.x + player.width / 2 - 2,
                y: player.y,
                width: 4,
                height: 10,
                speed: 7
            };
            bullets.push(bullet);
        }

        // 生成敌机
        function spawnEnemy() {
            let enemy = {
                x: Math.random() * (canvas.width - 30),
                y: -30,
                width: 30,
                height: 30,
                speed: 2 + Math.random() * 2
            };
            enemies.push(enemy);
        }

        // 碰撞检测
        function checkCollisions() {
            // 子弹与敌机
            for (let bIndex = bullets.length - 1; bIndex >= 0; bIndex--) {
                let bullet = bullets[bIndex];
                for (let eIndex = enemies.length - 1; eIndex >= 0; eIndex--) {
                    let enemy = enemies[eIndex];
                    if (bullet.x < enemy.x + enemy.width &&
                        bullet.x + bullet.width > enemy.x &&
                        bullet.y < enemy.y + enemy.height &&
                        bullet.y + bullet.height > enemy.y) {
                        bullets.splice(bIndex, 1);
                        enemies.splice(eIndex, 1);
                        score += 10;
                        if (score > highScore) {
                            highScore = score;
                            localStorage.setItem('planeWarHighScore', highScore);
                        }
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }

            // 敌机与玩家
            for (let eIndex = enemies.length - 1; eIndex >= 0; eIndex--) {
                let enemy = enemies[eIndex];
                if (player.x < enemy.x + enemy.width &&
                    player.x + player.width > enemy.x &&
                    player.y < enemy.y + enemy.height &&
                    player.y + player.height > enemy.y) {
                    gameState = 'gameover';
                }
            }
        }

        // 更新游戏逻辑
        function update(deltaTime) {
            if (gameState !== 'playing') return;

            // 玩家移动
            player.dx = 0;
            if (keys['ArrowLeft'] || keys['a'] || keys['A']) player.dx = -player.speed;
            if (keys['ArrowRight'] || keys['d'] || keys['D']) player.dx = player.speed;
            player.x += player.dx;
            // 边界检查
            if (player.x < 0) player.x = 0;
            if (player.x + player.width > canvas.width) player.x = canvas.width - player.width;

            // 更新子弹
            for (let i = bullets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                bullets[i].y -= bullets[i].speed;
                if (bullets[i].y < 0) bullets.splice(i, 1);
            }

            // 更新敌机
            for (let i = enemies.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                enemies[i].y += enemies[i].speed;
                if (enemies[i].y > canvas.height) enemies.splice(i, 1);
            }

            // 生成敌机
            if (Math.random() < 0.02) spawnEnemy();

            // 碰撞检测
            checkCollisions();
        }

        // 绘制菜单
        function drawMenu() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('飞机大战', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 50);
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('按空格键开始游戏', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
            ctx.fillText('最高分: ' + highScore, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
        }

        // 绘制游戏画面
        function drawGame() {
            // 绘制玩家飞机
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillRect(player.x, player.y, player.width, player.height);

            // 绘制敌机
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
            enemies.forEach(enemy => {
                ctx.fillRect(enemy.x, enemy.y, enemy.width, enemy.height);
            });

            // 绘制子弹
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd93d';
            bullets.forEach(bullet => {
                ctx.fillRect(bullet.x, bullet.y, bullet.width, bullet.height);
            });

            // 绘制得分
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('得分: ', canvas.width / 2 - 30, 30);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(score, canvas.width / 2 + 20, 30);
        }

        // 绘制暂停屏幕
        function drawPauseScreen() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('游戏暂停', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('按 P 继续', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
        }

        // 绘制游戏结束屏幕
        function drawGameOverScreen() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('游戏结束', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 50);
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('得分: ' + score, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
            ctx.fillText('最高分: ' + highScore, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
            ctx.fillText('按空格键重新开始', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 80);
        }

        // 渲染函数
        function render() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            if (gameState === 'menu') {
                drawMenu();
            } else if (gameState === 'playing') {
                drawGame();
            } else if (gameState === 'paused') {
                drawGame();
                drawPauseScreen();
            } else if (gameState === 'gameover') {
                drawGame();
                drawGameOverScreen();
            }
        }

        // 游戏循环
        let lastTime = 0;
        function gameLoop(timestamp) {
            let deltaTime = timestamp - lastTime;
            lastTime = timestamp;

            update(deltaTime);
            render();

            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }

        // 启动游戏循环
        requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    </script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>飞机大战</title>

            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            background: #0f0f1a;

            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        }
    </style>
</head>

            dx: 0
        };

        let enemies = [];
        let bullets = [];

        let keys = {};

        function handleInput(key, pressed) {
            keys[key] = pressed;

                if (gameState === 'menu') {
                    startGame();

                    shootBullet();

                    startGame();
                }
            } else if (key === 'p' || key === 'P') {
                if (pressed && (gameState === 'playing' || gameState === 'paused')) {
                    togglePause();
                }
            }
        }

        // 事件监听
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            handleInput(e.key, true);
        });
        document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => {
            handleInput(e.key, false);
        });

        // 开始游戏
        function startGame() {
            gameState = 'playing';
            score = 0;
            player.x = canvas.width / 2 - 20;
            enemies = [];
            bullets = [];
        }

        // 切换暂停
        function togglePause() {
            if (gameState === 'playing') {
                gameState = 'paused';
            } else if (gameState === 'paused') {
                gameState = 'playing';
            }
        }

        // 发射子弹
        function shootBullet() {
            let bullet = {
                x: player.x + player.width / 2 - 2,
                y: player.y,
                width: 4,
                height: 10,
                speed: 7
            };
            bullets.push(bullet);
        }

        // 生成敌机
        function spawnEnemy() {
            let enemy = {
                x: Math.random() * (canvas.width - 30),
                y: -30,
                width: 30,
                height: 30,
                speed: 2 + Math.random() * 2
            };
            enemies.push(enemy);
        }

        // 碰撞检测
        function checkCollisions() {
            // 子弹与敌机
            for (let bIndex = bullets.length - 1; bIndex >= 0; bIndex--) {
                let bullet = bullets[bIndex];
                for (let eIndex = enemies.length - 1; eIndex >= 0; eIndex--) {
                    let enemy = enemies[eIndex];
                    if (bullet.x < enemy.x + enemy.width &&
                        bullet.x + bullet.width > enemy.x &&
                        bullet.y < enemy.y + enemy.height &&
                        bullet.y + bullet.height > enemy.y) {
                        bullets.splice(bIndex, 1);
                        enemies.splice(eIndex, 1);
                        score += 10;
                        if (score > highScore) {
                            highScore = score;
                            localStorage.setItem('planeWarHighScore', highScore);
                        }
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }

            // 敌机与玩家
            for (let eIndex = enemies.length - 1; eIndex >= 0; eIndex--) {
                let enemy = enemies[eIndex];
                if (player.x < enemy.x + enemy.width &&
                    player.x + player.width > enemy.x &&
                    player.y < enemy.y + enemy.height &&
                    player.y + player.height > enemy.y) {
                    gameState = 'gameover';
                }
            }
        }

        // 更新游戏逻辑
        function update(deltaTime) {
            if (gameState !== 'playing') return;

            // 玩家移动
            player.dx = 0;
            if (keys['ArrowLeft'] || keys['a'] || keys['A']) player.dx = -player.speed;
            if (keys['ArrowRight'] || keys['d'] || keys['D']) player.dx = player.speed;
            player.x += player.dx;
            // 边界检查
            if (player.x < 0) player.x = 0;
            if (player.x + player.width > canvas.width) player.x = canvas.width - player.width;

            // 更新子弹
            for (let i = bullets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                bullets[i].y -= bullets[i].speed;
                if (bullets[i].y < 0) bullets.splice(i, 1);
            }

            // 更新敌机
            for (let i = enemies.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                enemies[i].y += enemies[i].speed;
                if (enemies[i].y > canvas.height) enemies.splice(i, 1);
            }

            // 生成敌机
            if (Math.random() < 0.02) spawnEnemy();

            // 碰撞检测
            checkCollisions();
        }

        // 绘制菜单
        function drawMenu() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('飞机大战', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 50);
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('按空格键开始游戏', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
            ctx.fillText('最高分: ' + highScore, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
        }

        // 绘制游戏画面
        function drawGame() {
            // 绘制玩家飞机
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillRect(player.x, player.y, player.width, player.height);

            // 绘制敌机
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
            enemies.forEach(enemy => {
                ctx.fillRect(enemy.x, enemy.y, enemy.width, enemy.height);
            });

            // 绘制子弹
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd93d';
            bullets.forEach(bullet => {
                ctx.fillRect(bullet.x, bullet.y, bullet.width, bullet.height);
            });

            // 绘制得分
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('得分: ', canvas.width / 2 - 30, 30);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(score, canvas.width / 2 + 20, 30);
        }

        // 绘制暂停屏幕
        function drawPauseScreen() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('游戏暂停', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('按 P 继续', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
        }

        // 绘制游戏结束屏幕
        function drawGameOverScreen() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('游戏结束', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 50);
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('得分: ' + score, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
            ctx.fillText('最高分: ' + highScore, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
            ctx.fillText('按空格键重新开始', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 80);
        }

        // 渲染函数
        function render() {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            if (gameState === 'menu') {
                drawMenu();
            } else if (gameState === 'playing') {
                drawGame();
            } else if (gameState === 'paused') {
                drawGame();
                drawPauseScreen();
            } else if (gameState === 'gameover') {
                drawGame();
                drawGameOverScreen();
            }
        }

        // 游戏循环
        let lastTime = 0;
        function gameLoop(timestamp) {
            let deltaTime = timestamp - lastTime;
            lastTime = timestamp;

            update(deltaTime);
            render();

            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }

        // 启动游戏循环
        requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    </script>
</body>
</html>
